message:
feat(demo_showcase): responsive window resize handling (bd-39bb)

- Add documentation for resize handling in PageModel trait
- Document the dimension tracking pattern for pages that cache content
- Fix missing AppMsg match arms (ToggleMouse, ToggleSyntax, ForceAscii)
- Pages receive dimensions via view() and can detect changes for reflow

See logs.rs for complete implementation of the resize pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
